zh.Isleworth, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可易斯列沃斯
zh.Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, No: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier de Saint Valéry於大約1035年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Gilbert I de Saint Valery59歲，母親Papia de Normandie57歲。他和Hodierne de Montlhery至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他於1096年被列為croisé。他去世於1098年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年64歲。

zh-hans.Isleworth, Middlesex, England: 英国英格兰米德萊可易斯列沃斯
zh-hans.Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, No: 法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gauthier de Saint Valéry于大约1035年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Gilbert I de Saint Valery59岁，母亲Papia de Normandie57岁。他和Hodierne de Montlhery至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他于1096年被列为croisé。他去世于1098年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Valéry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Colette, Pierre, Raoul, Yva.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Valery, French form of Latin Valerius (see Valerio ).
Americanized form of Italian   Valerio   or   Valeri  .

variants.name: Vallery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Monique.
French:
habitational name from Vallery in Yonne, once a Gallo-Roman estate, recorded in 1218 as Valerianus.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ana, Manuel, Pedro, Mario, Luis, Francisco, Ramon, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Lucio, Francesco, Maurizio, Niccolo, Romeo, Vito, Amadeo, Anastasio, Aureliano, Carmela.

Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Valerio, from Latin Valerius, a Roman surname ultimately derived from Latin valere ‘to flourish, to be strong and healthy’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, among them 4th-century bishops of Trier and Zaragoza and 5th-century bishops of Sorrento and of Antibes. Compare Valery .

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Walter .

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier de Saint Valéry was born about 1035, in Normandy, France, his father, Gilbert I de Saint Valery, was 59 and his mother, Papia de Normandie, was 57. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Hodierne de Montlhery. In 1096, at the age of 62, his occupation is listed as croisé. He died in 1098, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gauthier de Saint Valéry est né environ 1035, à Normandie, France, son père, Gilbert I de Saint Valery, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Papia de Normandie, avait 57 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Hodierne de Montlhery. En 1096, à l’âge de 62 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est croisé. Il est décédé en 1098, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gauthier de Saint Valéry um 1035 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert I de Saint Valery 59 und seine Mutter Papia de Normandie 57. Er hatte mit Hodierne de Montlhery mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1096, als er 62 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als croisé aufgeführt. Er starb 1098 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier de Saint Valéry è nato il circa 1035 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gilbert I de Saint Valery, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Papia de Normandie, aveva 57 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Hodierne de Montlhery. Nel 1096, all'età di 62 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come croisé. Morì nel 1098, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gauthier de Saint Valéryが約1035年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Gilbert I de Saint Valeryは59歳，母Papia de Normandieは57歳であった。彼はHodierne de Montlheryとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1096年，62歳の時，職業はcroiséと記録されている。彼は1098年にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier de Saint Valéry(이)가 대략 1035년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert I de Saint Valery(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Papia de Normandie(은)는 57세였다. 그는 Hodierne de Montlhery(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1096년, 62세의 나이로 그의 직업은 croisé이었다. 그는 1098년 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Isleworth, Middlesex, England: Isleworth, Middleseaxon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier de Saint Valéry nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Gilbert I de Saint Valery, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Papia de Normandie, tinha 57 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Hodierne de Montlhery. Em 1096, com 62 anos, sua profissão aparece como croisé. Ele faleceu em 1098, em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier de Saint Valéry родился около 1035 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilbert I de Saint Valery было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Papia de Normandie, 57. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Hodierne de Montlhery. В 1096 году, в возрасте 62 лет,  он работал по профессии croisé. Он умер в 1098 г. в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gauthier de Saint Valéry nació aproximadamente 1035, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gilbert I de Saint Valery, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Papia de Normandie, tenía 57 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Hodierne de Montlhery. En 1096, a la edad de 62 años, su ocupación registrada era croisé. Murió en 1098, en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 64 años.
